title: Beauty A and the Beast Z
overview: When the wrong boy professes his love for Ayumi, she struggles to find an appropriate way to reject him.

title: Yamamoto-san from next door
overview: Mamoru is in love with the girl next door, but she sees him as nothing more than a childhood friend. Meanwhile, Ayumi is head over heels for Mamoru.

title: Wavering Unbalance
overview: Preparations for the school sports tournament are underway, and everyone is on edge. Despite the agitation, there's a chance for sparks to fly between Kei Enomoto and Etsu Kusuda.

title: Love You More Than Anybody Else in the World
overview: With their father away on business, Koyoi is thrilled to have some brother-sister bonding time. Yoshihiko helps squash drama between Misaki and Yuuji.

title: Confused Diving
overview: Meguru refuses to join the swim team, self-conscious of the attention her breasts attract. Meanwhile, Hiroyuki realizes his love for Nao Chikura.

title: Before It Snows
overview: Preparation for a Christmas party leads to an embarrassing moment, causing Kei to treat Etsu harshly.

title: Let's Kiss
overview: Haruto Terai begins to feel unwanted because Rika is fiercly independent. Realizing how he feels, she seeks to reconcile the situation.

title: The Melancholy of the Chocolate Bomber
overview: As Valentine's Day approaches, each character attempts to win the heart of the one they love, with varied results.

title: In Full Bloom for Those Memories
overview: Nao is determined to finish up her painting of the graduating class. As she works she is left heartbroken as someone she cares about leaves.

title: Kappa Fight!!
overview: Sumire uses somewhat questionable tactics to get Etsu to join the theater club, which makes him a little angry.

title: Boys' Escape
overview: Frustrated, Mamoru, Hiroyuki, and Etsu make a plan to run away. Hearing about it, the girls get more and more worried.

title: First Love Limited
overview: The boys finally get the courage to shout out their feelings, and fate has an interesting trick up its sleeve.
